page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 32 dedicated physical cores operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 188.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 5.88 GB of RAM per core. For hardware acceleration, it integrates a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance type, and network connectivity is supported by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the average tier for general CPU and memory operations, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 13808.0 and a stress-ng multi-core CPU performance of 31109.57. However, its GPU-accelerated capabilities yield top-tier performance in specific workloads. In large language model inference tests using a small 135M model, the instance achieves prompt processing speeds of 9700.0 tokens per second and text generation speeds of 454.43 tokens per second. For a medium 7B model, it delivers 2489.49 tokens per second for prompt processing and 90.21 tokens per second for text generation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge offers a balanced hardware profile for organizations requiring dedicated compute resources and moderate GPU acceleration without the overhead of massive multi-GPU configurations. The absence of local storage requires external block storage attachment, which should be factored into architectural planning. This instance is highly suited for workloads such as medium-scale LLM inference, machine learning model deployment, ray tracing, and graphics-intensive rendering tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for compute-intensive and graphics workloads. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8369B processor featuring 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 188.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage but provides a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. In benchmark testing, the ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge demonstrates top-tier performance in LLM inference, processing 2489.49 tokens per second for prompt processing on a 7B model. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads such as AI inference, machine learning model deployment, ray tracing, and high-performance computing tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU cores and GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 188 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB VRAM for high-performance AI inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge features 32 Intel Xeon cores, 188 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU, optimized for AI inference and ray tracing.
tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute platform featuring NVIDIA Ampere A10 acceleration for high-throughput AI inference and graphics rendering workloads.

NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of dedicated VRAM
188.0 GB of system memory and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
